query:
-- 1. Remover colunas Codilo da tabela processos
ALTER TABLE processos
  DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS codilo_processo_id,
  DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS monitoramento_ativo;

-- 2. Renomear status_interno → status_original
ALTER TABLE processos
  CHANGE COLUMN status_interno status_original VARCHAR(255) NULL;

-- 3. Adicionar colunas Judit
ALTER TABLE processos
  ADD COLUMN judit_process_id VARCHAR(128) NULL AFTER status_original,
  ADD COLUMN fonte_atualizacao ENUM('judit') DEFAULT 'judit' NOT NULL AFTER judit_process_id;

-- 4. Criar tabela de controle de requisições Judit
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS judit_requests (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  cnj VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL,
  request_id VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  status ENUM('processing', 'completed', 'error') DEFAULT 'processing' NOT NULL,
  processo_id INT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  INDEX idx_cnj (cnj),
  INDEX idx_status (status),
  INDEX idx_created_at (created_at)
);

-- 2. Renomear status_interno → status_original
